mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password, nickname) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{nickname})
INSERT INTO users (email, nickname, provider, provider_id) VALUES (#{email}, #{nickname}, #{provider}, #{providerId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND provider IS NULL
SELECT id , email , password , nickname , created_at , provider FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET is_deleted = true WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET nickname = #{newNickname} WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.name FROM roles r JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.role_id = r.role_id JOIN users u ON u.id = ur.id WHERE u.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET is_deleted = false WHERE id = #{id}
